name: lava_crucible
title: Lava Crucible
short_description: Tiered lava-heated crucibles that convert stone into volcanic soil with weighted bonus drops.
long_description:
Lava Crucible adds tiered crucibles that process stone into volcanic soil when heated by adjacent lava.

Key features:
- Three tiers: single, double, and quad processing throughput.
- Ender variants with shared per-player inventories.
- Weighted bonus output pools with ore-dust rewards during conversion.
- Distinct visual states for cold, hot, processing, and done states.
- Designed as the advanced production path for volcanic soil progression.

Compatibility:
- Required: default, ore_dust, volcanic_soil
- Optional: moreores, technic
